title: Oak Wave Wall Sculpture
description: Hand-carved from solid English oak using a CNC router and finished by hand. Each piece has a unique grain pattern. Approx 40cm × 30cm. Comes ready to hang with concealed fixings.

title: Geometric Birch Panel
description: A precision-cut geometric pattern milled into birch plywood. The relief depth creates dramatic shadow lines that shift throughout the day. Wax-finished. 50cm × 50cm.

title: Contour Landscape — Walnut
description: Topographic contours of the Lake District milled in layers of walnut veneer. A conversation piece for any wall. Limited run of 5. Signed and numbered.
